# Metrics Reference

<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate-metrics-reference.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

This reference is generated from `OPEN_METRICS_REFERENCE` in `src/prometheus-export.ts`.
Run `npm run docs:generate-metrics-reference` after changing exported OpenMetrics families.

Counter metric families omit the `_total` suffix in OpenMetrics `# TYPE` lines, but the emitted sample names keep the suffix shown below.
Histogram rows list the base family name; scrapes emit `_bucket`, `_sum`, and `_count` samples for each observed label set.

## Metric Families

| Name | Type | Labels | Help | Emitted when |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| <code>kb_build_info</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>commit</code>, <code>version</code> | Build identity for the serving process. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_knowledge_base_files</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>kb</code> | Number of ingestable source files by knowledge base. | Emitted once per registered knowledge base. |
| <code>kb_knowledge_base_chunks</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>kb</code> | Number of dense index chunks by knowledge base. | Emitted once per registered knowledge base. |
| <code>kb_knowledge_base_indexed_bytes</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>kb</code> | Total bytes from ingestable files by knowledge base. | Emitted once per registered knowledge base. |
| <code>kb_knowledge_base_quarantined_chunks</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>kb</code> | Number of quarantined chunks by knowledge base. | Emitted once per knowledge base with quarantined chunks. |
| <code>kb_server_uptime_ms</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Process uptime in milliseconds for the serving process. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_index_embedding_dimensions</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Embedding dimension of the active FAISS index, or 0 when unknown. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_index_last_update_timestamp_seconds</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Unix timestamp of the latest completed index update, or 0 when no update has completed. | Always emitted from the latest index update summary. |
| <code>kb_index_update_status</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>status</code> | One-hot status of the latest index update (1 for the current status, 0 otherwise). | Always emitted once per bounded index update status. |
| <code>kb_index_update_failures</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Failure count recorded by the latest index update; this is a snapshot, not a cumulative counter. | Always emitted from the latest index update summary. |
| <code>kb_index_update_duration_seconds</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Duration of the latest completed index update in seconds, or 0 when unavailable. | Always emitted from the latest index update summary. |
| <code>kb_provider_calls_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>model_id</code> | Embedding provider calls by model id. | Emitted once per embedding model observed by the process. |
| <code>kb_provider_call_errors_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>model_id</code> | Embedding provider call errors by model id. | Emitted once per embedding model observed by the process. |
| <code>kb_provider_tokens_in_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>model_id</code> | Reported input tokens consumed by embedding provider calls. | Emitted once per model after the provider reports token usage. |
| <code>kb_provider_call_latency_p50_ms</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>model_id</code> | Embedding provider call latency p50 by model id, in milliseconds. | Emitted once per embedding model observed by the process. |
| <code>kb_provider_call_latency_p95_ms</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>model_id</code> | Embedding provider call latency p95 by model id, in milliseconds. | Emitted once per embedding model observed by the process. |
| <code>kb_provider_call_latency_p99_ms</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>model_id</code> | Embedding provider call latency p99 by model id, in milliseconds. | Emitted once per embedding model observed by the process. |
| <code>kb_llm_calls_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code> | Chat-completion calls by bounded operation. | Emitted once per chat operation observed by the process. |
| <code>kb_llm_call_errors_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code> | Chat-completion call errors by bounded operation. | Emitted once per chat operation observed by the process. |
| <code>kb_llm_tokens_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code>, <code>token_type</code> | Reported prompt and completion tokens consumed by chat-completion calls. | Emitted once per operation and token type after the provider reports usage. |
| <code>kb_llm_attempts_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code> | Provider attempts made by bounded chat-completion operation. | Emitted once per chat operation observed by the process. |
| <code>kb_llm_retries_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code> | Provider retries after the first attempt by bounded chat-completion operation. | Emitted once per chat operation observed by the process. |
| <code>kb_llm_cache_outcomes_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code>, <code>outcome</code> | Workflow-boundary cache outcomes for chat-completion paths. | Emitted after a chat workflow records a bounded cache outcome. |
| <code>kb_llm_answer_impact_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code>, <code>impact</code> | Workflow-declared impact of chat-completion results on the answer path. | Emitted after a chat workflow records bounded answer impact. |
| <code>kb_llm_attributed_calls_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code>, <code>provider</code>, <code>model</code> | Logical chat-completion calls by operation, bounded provider, and coarse model family. | Emitted once per observed operation/provider/coarse-model combination. |
| <code>kb_llm_attributed_call_errors_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code>, <code>provider</code>, <code>model</code> | Chat-completion logical call errors by operation, bounded provider, and coarse model family. | Emitted once per observed operation/provider/coarse-model combination. |
| <code>kb_llm_attributed_attempts_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code>, <code>provider</code>, <code>model</code> | Provider attempts by operation, bounded provider, and coarse model family. | Emitted once per observed operation/provider/coarse-model combination. |
| <code>kb_llm_attributed_retries_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code>, <code>provider</code>, <code>model</code> | Provider retries by operation, bounded provider, and coarse model family. | Emitted once per observed operation/provider/coarse-model combination. |
| <code>kb_llm_attributed_tokens_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>operation</code>, <code>provider</code>, <code>model</code>, <code>token_type</code> | Reported chat-completion tokens by operation, bounded provider, coarse model family, and token type. | Emitted after a provider reports usage for an attributed call. |
| <code>kb_provider_circuit_state</code> | <code>gauge</code> | <code>kind</code>, <code>provider</code> | Provider circuit-breaker state (0=closed, 1=half-open, 2=open) by provider and kind; the worst state is reported when several keys share a provider/kind. | Emitted once per provider/kind after a breaker has tracked at least one call in this process. |
| <code>kb_provider_circuit_open_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>kind</code>, <code>provider</code> | Cumulative provider circuit-breaker open transitions by provider and kind. | Emitted once per provider/kind after a breaker has tracked at least one call in this process. |
| <code>kb_search_requests_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>mode</code>, <code>status</code> | Daemon-served search requests by effective mode and status. | Emitted after daemon-served search requests are observed. |
| <code>kb_search_degraded_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>mode</code>, <code>reason</code> | Search requests degraded from dense-provider retrieval to lexical-only output by bounded reason. | Emitted after degraded daemon-served search requests are observed. |
| <code>kb_search_kb_failures_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>kb</code> | Per-KB fan-out failures in the multi-KB search leg (load/refresh/query errors that yielded partial results) by knowledge base. | Emitted once per knowledge base that has failed at least one fan-out during the process lifetime. |
| <code>kb_rerank_invocations_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Reranker-stage invocations. | Emitted when reranker telemetry is available. |
| <code>kb_rerank_skipped_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>reason</code> | Reranker-stage skips by bounded reason. | Emitted when reranker telemetry is available and skip reasons have been observed. |
| <code>kb_rerank_candidates_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>source</code> | Reranker-stage candidates by scoring source. | Emitted when reranker telemetry is available and candidate sources have been observed. |
| <code>kb_query_cache_hits_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Query embedding cache hits. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_query_cache_misses_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Query embedding cache misses. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_query_cache_bypasses_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Query embedding cache bypasses. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_query_cache_disk_size_bytes</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Query embedding cache disk usage in bytes. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_query_cache_outcomes_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>outcome</code> | Coarse query embedding cache workflow outcomes. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_answer_cache_hits_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Answer cache hits. | Emitted when answer-cache stats are available. |
| <code>kb_answer_cache_misses_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Answer cache misses. | Emitted when answer-cache stats are available. |
| <code>kb_answer_cache_outcomes_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | <code>outcome</code> | Coarse answer-cache workflow outcomes. | Emitted when answer-cache stats are available. |
| <code>kb_answer_cache_disk_size_bytes</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Answer cache disk usage in bytes. | Emitted when answer-cache stats are available. |
| <code>kb_relevance_gate_queries_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Relevance-gated retrieval queries. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_relevance_gate_verdict_injected_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Relevance gate injected-context verdict count. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_relevance_gate_verdict_no_relevant_context_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Relevance gate no-relevant-context verdict count. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_relevance_gate_verdict_empty_index_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Relevance gate empty-index verdict count. | Always emitted. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_requests_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport requests. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_sessions_opened_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport sessions opened. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_sessions_closed_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport sessions closed. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_current_sessions</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Current remote HTTP/SSE transport sessions. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_in_flight_requests</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Current in-flight remote HTTP/SSE transport requests. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_auth_failures_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport authentication failures. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_origin_denials_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport CORS origin denials. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_responses_1xx_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport 1xx responses. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_responses_2xx_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport 2xx responses. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_responses_3xx_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport 3xx responses. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_responses_4xx_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport 4xx responses. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_remote_transport_responses_5xx_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Remote HTTP/SSE transport 5xx responses. | Emitted when HTTP or SSE transport stats are available. |
| <code>kb_search_request_duration_ms</code> | <code>histogram</code> | <code>le</code>, <code>mode</code>, <code>status</code> | End-to-end daemon-served search request latency in milliseconds. | Emitted after daemon-served search requests are observed. |
| <code>kb_llm_call_latency_ms</code> | <code>histogram</code> | <code>le</code>, <code>operation</code> | Chat-completion call latency in milliseconds by bounded operation. | Emitted after chat-completion calls are observed. |
| <code>kb_llm_attributed_call_latency_ms</code> | <code>histogram</code> | <code>le</code>, <code>operation</code>, <code>provider</code>, <code>model</code> | Chat-completion logical call latency in milliseconds by operation, bounded provider, and coarse model family. | Emitted after attributed chat-completion calls are observed. |
| <code>kb_search_stage_duration_ms</code> | <code>histogram</code> | <code>le</code>, <code>mode</code>, <code>stage</code>, <code>status</code> | Daemon-served search stage latency in milliseconds. | Emitted after daemon-served search stage timings are observed. |
| <code>kb_rerank_latency_ms</code> | <code>histogram</code> | <code>le</code>, <code>source</code> | Reranker-stage latency in milliseconds, split by bounded scoring source. | Emitted when reranker latency telemetry is available. |
| <code>kb_write_lock_wait_duration_ms</code> | <code>histogram</code> | <code>le</code>, <code>resource_kind</code> | Write-lock acquisition wait time in milliseconds, split by bounded resource kind. | Emitted after write-lock wait telemetry is observed. |
| <code>kb_write_lock_hold_duration_ms</code> | <code>histogram</code> | <code>le</code>, <code>resource_kind</code> | Write-lock function hold time in milliseconds, split by bounded resource kind. | Emitted after write-lock hold telemetry is observed. |
| <code>kb_daemon_inflight</code> | <code>gauge</code> | _none_ | Admitted-but-incomplete kb serve daemon requests (running + queued). | Emitted only by local kb serve metrics export. |
| <code>kb_daemon_rejected_total</code> | <code>counter</code> | _none_ | Total kb serve daemon requests rejected by admission control. | Emitted only by local kb serve metrics export. |
